description:
## Component: hx-tree-view (NEW)
**Tier 2 — Standard Enterprise | Industry Consensus: 4/6 libraries**

Hierarchical tree for navigating nested data structures.

### ADR-001 Classification: Slot-Driven (Composite)
Drupal controls tree items via slots. Component provides expand/collapse and keyboard navigation.

### API Design
**Properties:** `selection` (none|single|multiple)
**Slots:** Default (hx-tree-item children)
**Events:** `hx-select` (composed: true, detail: { item, selected })

### Child: hx-tree-item
**Properties:** `expanded` (boolean), `selected`, `disabled`, `indent` (level)
**Slots:** Default (label), `children` (nested hx-tree-item), `icon`
**CSS Parts:** `item`, `label`, `expand-icon`, `children`

### Drupal Integration
```twig
{# Taxonomy hierarchy #}
<hx-tree-view selection="single">
  {% for term in taxonomy_tree %}
    <hx-tree-item {% if term.children %}expanded{% endif %}>
      {{ term.name }}
      {% if term.children %}
        {% for child in term.children %}
          <hx-tree-item slot="children">{{ child.name }}</hx-tree-item>
        {% endfor %}
      {% endif %}
    </hx-tree-item>
  {% endfor %}
</hx-tree-view>
```

### Healthcare: Org chart navigation, ICD-10 code hierarchy, department structure, menu management

### Acceptance Criteria
1. Nested expand/collapse with animation
2. Single and multi-selection modes
3. Keyboard: Arrow keys navigate, Enter selects, Left/Right expand/collapse
4. WCAG 2.1 AA: tree/treeitem roles, aria-expanded
5. Lazy loading support for large trees (via events)
title: T2-36: hx-tree-view — Hierarchical Tree Structure
